title.en: England were 15 minutes from humiliation - the issues Tuchel must solve
title.zh-CN: 英格兰距离屈辱还有15分钟--图切尔必须解决的问题

summary.en: Before England's World Cup last-16 tie against Mexico, BBC Sport's Phil McNulty looks at the issues that remain for Thomas Tuchel.
summary.zh-CN: 在英格兰世界杯16强对阵墨西哥之前，英国广播公司体育台的菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）研究了托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）

title.en: England fans face resale prices of at least £2,600 for Mexico tickets
title.zh-CN: 英格兰球迷面临墨西哥门票至少2600 £的转售价格

summary.en: England fans hoping to attend the World Cup last-16 showdown with Mexico face paying a minimum of £2,600 for one ticket on Fifa's resale site.
summary.zh-CN: 希望参加世界杯16强对决的英格兰球迷将在国际足联转售网站上支付至少2,600 £购买一张门票。

title.en: USA march on but will Balogun red card prove costly?
title.zh-CN: 美国继续前进，但Balogun红牌是否会代价高昂？

summary.en: Mauricio Pochettino's USA side set up a World Cup last-16 meeting with Belgium, but how costly will forward Folarin Balogun's red card prove?
summary.zh-CN: 毛里西奥·波切蒂诺（ Mauricio Pochettino ）的美国方面与比利时举办了世界杯最后16场会议，但转发Folarin Balogun的红牌的成本有多高？

title.en: Bronze renews contract with Chelsea until 2027
title.zh-CN: 铜牌与切尔西续约至2027年

summary.en: England international Lucy Bronze has signed a contract extension with Chelsea until 2027.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰国脚露西·布朗兹已与切尔西续约至2027年。

title.en: Balogun scores & sees red as USA beat Bosnia
title.zh-CN: Balogun在美国击败波斯尼亚时得分并看到红色

summary.en: Folarin Balogun scores and is later sent off as the United States advance past a lacklustre Bosnia-Herzegovina in Santa Clara to reach the last 16 of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: Folarin Balogun得分，后来随着美国在圣克拉拉越过平淡无奇的波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那，进入世界杯的最后16场比赛而被罚下场。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 25
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星25号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Merse: Mexico is heads-or-tails match - they could run England off their feet
title.zh-CN: Merse ：墨西哥是正反比赛-他们可以让英格兰站起来

summary.en: Sky Sports' Paul Merson looks ahead to England's last-16 World Cup encounter with co-hosts Mexico on Monday, a game he thinks is too close to call.
summary.zh-CN: 天空体育的保罗·默森（ Paul Merson ）展望了英格兰队周一与共同主办方墨西哥的最后16场世界杯比赛，他认为这场比赛太接近了。

title.en: Steely USA overcome Bosnia and Herzegovina and controversial red to reach World Cup last 16
title.zh-CN: 斯蒂利美国击败波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那和有争议的红军，进入世界杯16强

summary.en: The US had their hands on their heads. Weston McKennie’s face betrayed a look of total disbelief. Mauricio Pochettino waved his hands towards the sky, incredulous.Folarin Balogun had been sent off...
summary.zh-CN: 美国人把手放在头上。韦斯顿·麦肯尼的脸上露出一副难以置信的神情。毛里西奥·波切蒂诺怀疑地向天空挥了挥手，佛罗林·巴洛根被送走了……

title.en: Cape Verde’s Sidny Lopes Cabral: ‘If you’re like “oh, it’s Messi”, you’re gonna lose your mind’
title.zh-CN: 佛得角的西德尼·洛佩斯·卡布拉尔（ Sidny Lopes Cabral ） ： “如果你说‘哦，是梅西’ ，你会疯掉的”

summary.en: The full-back on defying the odds, dealing with racism, Cape Verde’s party people and taking on Lionel Messi“When we saw 1%, we just laughed.” Cape Verde liked those odds, and so did Sidny Lopes...
summary.zh-CN: 后卫无视困难，应对种族主义，佛得角的派对人民，并与莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）对抗“当我们看到1 ％时，我们只是笑了。“佛得角喜欢这种可能性，西德尼·洛佩斯也喜欢……

title.en: Germany are no longer a tournament team and must reconnect with our own identity | Philipp Lahm
title.zh-CN: 德国不再是一支锦标赛队伍，必须重新认识我们自己的身份| Philipp Lahm

summary.en: Germany’s third early World Cup exit in a row is not down to a lack of talent or the name of the coach, but not knowing how they want to play I am stunned. Germany have been eliminated early from a...
summary.zh-CN: 德国队连续第三次退出世界杯并不是因为缺乏天赋或教练的名字，但不知道他们想打什么，我感到震惊。德国很早就被淘汰出局……

title.en: A goal, a red and a LeBron James shout: Folarin Balogun gets the spotlight in US’s wild World Cup win

title.en: Kane scores twice as England come from behind to reach last 16
title.zh-CN: 凯恩得分是英格兰队从后面到最后16分的两倍

summary.en: Harry Kane scores twice as England come from behind to beat DR Congo in a tense World Cup encounter in Atlanta, and set up a last-16 meeting with Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 在亚特兰大的一场紧张的世界杯比赛中，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）的得分是英格兰队从后面击败刚果民主共和国的两倍，并安排了与墨西哥的最后16场会议。

title.en: Tielemans & Trossard go from heated row to rescuing Belgium
title.zh-CN: Tielemans和Trossard从激烈争吵到拯救比利时

summary.en: Belgium's Leandro Trossard and Youri Tielemans go from arguing with each other during the hydration break to combining to get a crucial equalising goal against Senegal in Seattle.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时的莱安德罗·特罗萨德（ Leandro Trossard ）和尤里·蒂勒曼斯（ Youri Tielemans ）在补水休息期间互相争吵，最终在西雅图对阵塞内加尔的比赛中取得了关键的均衡目标

title.en: Win over DR Congo 'our best game of the tournament' - Kane
title.zh-CN: 赢得刚果民主共和国“我们锦标赛中最好的比赛” -凯恩

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane believes the Three Lions' attacking play against DR Congo was the best they have shown so far in the World Cup after their 2-1 win in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）认为，三狮队对阵刚果民主共和国的进攻比赛是他们在亚特兰大2-1获胜后迄今为止在世界杯上表现最好的比赛。

title.en: 'Why not take advantage?' - did hydration breaks spark England comeback?
title.zh-CN: “为什么不善加利用？” --水合作用是否会引发英格兰卷土重来？

summary.en: England came from behind to beat DR Congo and reach the last 16 of the World Cup, but did the momentum noticeably swing their way after the hydration breaks?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队从后面击败了刚果民主共和国队，进入了世界杯的最后16场比赛，但是在水合作用中断后，这种势头是否明显改变了？
